must have at least one Medicare inpatient claim or two other non-drug 
claims of any service type with a related code in any position during the two-year reference period. 
When two claims are required, they must occur at least one day apart. 

You can find more detailed information on the criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories
